selections.name: Kinetic Kiss
selections.reason: Gai Waterhouse & Adrian Bott first starter who won a recent trial. Stable is elite with 2yos and will have her fit for the heavy conditions.

selections.name: Demerzel
selections.reason: Stablemate to the top pick, has trialled solidly and commands respect on debut.

selections.name: Excelluna
selections.reason: Has race experience on soft ground, finishing a solid 2nd last start. Fitness edge.

selections.name: Krasina
selections.reason: Ran a decent 4th on slow going last start, will appreciate the extra fitness.

danger_horse.name: Explosive Express
danger_horse.reason: Waller debutant who trialled well on soft ground. Big threat if she handles the heavy.

selections.name: Claudel
selections.reason: Waller first starter who won a trial on Heavy ground. Bred to handle the conditions perfectly.

selections.name: Our Huntress
selections.reason: Consistent filly who placed on soft ground last start. Ready to break through.

selections.name: Solar Dance
selections.reason: Placed on heavy ground on debut, showing she can handle the testing conditions.

selections.name: Merini
selections.reason: Solid form but drawn wide. Can figure if she gets luck in running.

danger_horse.name: Extra Special
danger_horse.reason: Ran 4th on slow ground on debut, open to natural improvement.

selections.name: Samaka
selections.reason: Snowden trained with good form on wet tracks (2nd and 3rd on slow). Ready to win.

selections.name: Crescent King
selections.reason: Ran 4th on heavy ground on debut. Will take immense benefit from that experience.

selections.name: Unleash Harry
selections.reason: Placed on slow ground before a break. Resumes here and trialled well.

selections.name: Yattazou
selections.reason: Waller runner drawn well. Forgive last start on slow, capable of bouncing back.

danger_horse.name: Lady Invictus
danger_horse.reason: Gai/Bott runner who won a recent trial. Big threat if she gains a start.

selections.name: Hovland
selections.reason: Proven on Heavy ground, running a strong 3rd under these exact conditions last start. Peaking third-up.

selections.name: Portsmouth
selections.reason: Class runner with heavy track form in the UK. Will strip fitter second-up.

selections.name: Stellar Rhonda
selections.reason: Consistent mare who handles give in the ground. Should be running on strongly.

selections.name: Viewpoint
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 2. Can bounce back with blinkers on first time.

danger_horse.name: A Pound Of Salt
danger_horse.reason: Drops in weight and has the ability to surprise if the pace is genuine.

selections.name: Nandina
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd on Heavy ground last start. Looks perfectly placed to go one better today.

selections.name: Graphic Sight
selections.reason: Proven Heavy track winner returning from a spell. Trials suggest he is ready.

selections.name: Sociable
selections.reason: Good form including a 2nd on slow ground last start. Drawn perfectly.

selections.name: Last Druid
selections.reason: Won well last start on soft ground. Must be respected if he gains a start.

danger_horse.name: Nullarbor Jane
danger_horse.reason: Won on soft ground last start. Wide draw is the only concern.

selections.name: Black Babylon
selections.reason: Ran an outstanding 2nd on Heavy ground last start over a similar trip. Perfectly placed to win.

selections.name: Natoya
selections.reason: Finished 3rd behind Black Babylon in that same heavy track race. Solid form.

selections.name: Cormac T
selections.reason: Class runner who handles wet conditions. Will appreciate the drop in grade.

selections.name: Le Troisir
selections.reason: Consistent type who can figure in the finish with the right run.

danger_horse.name: Majorian
danger_horse.reason: Forgive last start on heavy; capable of much better on his best form.

selections.name: Formal
selections.reason: Good 3rd on Heavy ground last start. Ready to peak third-up from a spell.

selections.name: Twisted Queen
selections.reason: Won on soft ground last start. Progressive mare who handles the wet.

selections.name: Abuse Of Power
selections.reason: Solid 4th on Heavy ground last start. Represents good value at odds.

selections.name: Metaphorically
selections.reason: Drawn well and handles wet tracks. Can bounce back from a poor run last start.

danger_horse.name: Cape Byron
danger_horse.reason: Classy gelding resuming. If he handles the heavy track, he is a major threat.
